reviews.review_description:
Thank you folks. Don't get me wrong, I love all the newest games as much as anyone but I have never come across a game that delivers 100% perfect nostalgia. If you grew up with Wolf, Duke (and especially Doom) and you want to have the perfect blast from the past, then this game is for you. You guys absolutely nailed this. Great graphics, weapons, simple story and easy to play. Love the old timey secrets on the levels.
DEVS, this is my childhood in VR and I can't get enough.
Please let me know if you got more like this, you can just directly take my paycheck 😆 
Great game, great price, great fun. Thanks friends.

I’ve been using VR for almost a decade and it’s rare to run across a game that lets you move as fast as a classic first person shooter. I understand the need to keep things tame to minimize motion sickness, but it’s nice to have the option to speed things up for those of us who no longer get VR sickness.

Played with the movement speed cranked all the way up, the blinders off, and using my feet to turn as fast as I want, this game is a blast!

I’ve only played through the first few levels, but in that short time this game has really impressed. It ticks a lot of classic video game boxes.

The game runs smoothly on the Quest 3 and I haven’t run into any glitches yet.

I’d love to see real time lightning and improved effects like shockwaves from explosions, but considering that this game has been out for more than two years and has only a handful of reviews I can’t blame the developers for not putting more hours into this project. (Despite that there was an update just last month and they added the option to disable laser sights.)

What I’ve experienced so far is great fun, provided you’re in the target audience. The target audience are fans of classic games like Doom and Quake.

A recent poor review was from somebody who is apparently not in this target audience so they were extremely disappointed.

The first sentence in the store description reads: “VR meets old school FPS.” If that’s what you’re looking for then you should be very happy.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and the feedback. I will be releasing more updates this summer. First I am going to resolve some complaints about the locomotion, and then I will be adding another level. Improving the explosions has long been on my list.

reviews.review_description:
I’m sure the dev is a nice person and worked hard on this, but this is a big no. Forget the money you spend (and I only spent $1)… it’s the time you can’t get back. It’s just a SIMPLE point and click shooter. And when I say simple, it’s just that. The exploding barrels are also useless since they have a blast range of about 3 inches. The guns aren’t any fun to use, the enemies all die the same, regardless where you hit em… 
Maybe if I was brand new to vr this game would seem ok… but there’s about 500 better shooters offered on the quest store.

developer_response.body: I am sorry the game is not your cup of tea. It is a retro-inspired shooter, as mentioned in both the trailer and in the description. Retro shooters generally consisted of shooting and simple lock and key gameplay, if that is not what you are looking for then the game is not for you. There are some more complex elements/puzzles if you play further into the game (but I doubt you played very far).

reviews.review_title: nice shooter but strafing feels off
reviews.review_description:
Quite a nice shooter, reminiscent of Quake but could benefit from some changes to strafing that make it more comfortable.   

Im getting nauseous because the strafing comes on suddenly (rather than gradually like other shooters) and seems to trigger fully when the left stick is slightly off centre.  This means it can trigger accidentally when trying to move forward, and that difference between what I expect to see and what I actually see then makes me feel a bit squiffy.

For the dev, I would recommend looking at something like Compound and seeing how that does strafing.  If its something you still feel is important to your game and dont want to change then maybe consider adding another option to disable strafing completely (much like you've done already for snap turning which is very welcome and useful so thank you for that!).

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. What you are noticing is likely that the dead zone for the joystick is large. This was to mitigate a common problem with the Quest 2 controllers where after a lot of use, they would start to drift (which made the game unplayable). I'll change it in the next update. I'll definitely check out the game you mentioned to see how the strafing works.

reviews.review_description:
This is a really good fps shooter. Has quake esq. Visuals, some light portal style puzzles, and a decent soundtrack. Definitely worth the price.

The only negative is the frame rate can be a smidge chunky when turning.

Fantastic game that deserves more exposure. Environments are nicely designed, graphics are detailed and weapons feel good. The music is fantastic! It's a little on the shorter side and could use a bit more content but overall this is a gem.

One question: I'm really struggling with (what I think is) the final boss. Looked for a discord server for this game but couldn't find one.

Devs, are there any ways to reach out for questions and advice?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! There is a discord server for the game: https://discord.gg/qdyUnPw5AW (you can find it on the official game website https://realmofthefallen.com at the bottom of the page). 

I will be adding a new level soon, possibly two over the next few months.

reviews.review_title: An Epic Dungeon Adventure You Can't Miss
reviews.review_description:
🗡️ Review:
This VR game throws you into a thrilling dungeon crawl with excellent game mechanics that feel like a perfect mix of DOOM, Metroid, and Indiana Jones. The action is fast-paced and intense, with a great selection of weapons to keep combat exciting.

What really stands out are the interdimensional environments—each one is unique, visually stunning, and packed with engaging obstacles that keep you on your toes. The game constantly surprises you with new challenges, making every moment feel fresh and adventurous.

If you're looking for a VR game that combines exploration, combat, and puzzle-solving in an immersive, action-packed setting, this is the one. Highly recommended!

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (5/5)

Not too taxing puzzles and nostalgic Doom gameplay.

Just needs a heavy rock soundtrack.

Cracking!

Really good game but .please fix the turning it's really juddering it spoils the game. The graphics are not bad  could be better .the sounds could be better creepier  .and guns could sound better  .I would love to give this game five stars 🌟  shame

developer_response.body: If you feel that there is judder when you turn, most likely you have snap turning enabled. This can be disabled in the options. When you initially start the game you select comfort presets, if you select the less intense modes then snap turn will be enabled.

reviews.review_title: Very Good Gane One Dumb Thing..
reviews.review_description:
Very Good shooter,  but it's currently too short.  Great level design too !!  The one incredibly dumb thing they did throughout the game is display in huge text over the screen basically telling you what to do anywhere there is even a slight puzzle to figure out. 
Instead of letting YOU figure it out it helps you out by telling you exactly what to do.  It might as well play itself while you watch in VR.  It's there to help you finish the short game even faster....  Before, fighting a boss it basically tells you what to do.
To climb up and avoid a moving platform it literally shows you what do with arrows and everything.  It didn't need to be dumbed down so much.
(Really, at all.)

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing the game, and the feedback. When I was doing user testing there were a lot people that got stuck and couldn't figure things out. Also when people streamed the game the same thing would often happen. There were some people (like yourself) that just figured out everything really fast. I do plan on expanding the game, and I will keep your feedback in mind.

reviews.review_title: Great Game, deserves much more attention
reviews.review_description: It is really a well done game, enemies show with hit animations which increases the Immersion, I recommend it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: Really fun game. The environment, music, and sound effects are great. Game mechanics and controls are also really nice and easy to learn.

I love good indie games and this one was such a treat. It's pretty long for an indie shooter and it has a cool retro - Quake vibes. Great soundtrack also!

One thing to consider - it can cause motion sickness if you're not used to this type of locomotion.
wow totally enjoying this game, the environments are stunning and the game play gives me doom vibes

developer_response.body: I am glad you enjoyed the game. I have been waiting to add more content to make it less hidden.

reviews.review_description: Great Metroid style game. Tons to explore, secrets to find. Definitely made to be a tribute to older FPS games. Very fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks! If I had infinite time I would make a Metroidvania version. Maybe one day.

reviews.review_description: It’s like Quake but this time you can dual wield.   Fun levels and endless survival mode make this game easily accessible. I love that I can pick up and play at any time

developer_response.body: Thanks! I'm glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_title: Fantastic start! Worth playing for sure!
reviews.review_description: This game has a lot going for it and balances smooth vr mechanics with an awesome retro style. I wonder if there could be a few last quick time events and jump scares but overall this one's a definite play recommendation. For the price there's nothing better.
If you're looking for an action packed shooter-metroidvania give this one a shot!

developer_response.body: I'm glad you had fun playing the game! At the time you reviewed it, the game was a Metroidvania. I ended up just making it a simple FPS.

reviews.review_description: I won this game from a raffles from a streamer and I like this game I like the enemies graphics and combat it’s really nice
